general.report_title: Python Basics - Day 11 Homework Grading Report

online_content.description: Review the Basics workflow for `with open(...)`, writing one line at a time, and loading text back safely.
linked_tests: Hour 41 - text file writing and loading with with-open

online_content.description: Use the standard-library `json` docs to revisit `json.dump`, `json.load`, and the plain Python structures JSON can store.
linked_tests: Hour 42 - JSON persistence with list-of-dict records

online_content.description: Review project-relative paths, `mkdir(exist_ok=True)`, and `glob('*.json')` for directory discovery.
linked_tests: Hour 43 - pathlib directory creation and JSON discovery

online_content.description: Revisit targeted exception handling with `ValueError`, `FileNotFoundError`, `JSONDecodeError`, plus the `else` and `finally` patterns.
linked_tests: Hour 44 - specific exception handling with else and finally
